---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 122, Firefox 123, Safari 17]
- App version / commit: [e.g. main @ abc1234]

## ⚠️ Security Note
If this bug has security implications (data exposure, encryption bypass, auth issues), **please do not file a public issue**. Email security@clareifi.com instead. See [SECURITY.md](../../docs/SECURITY.md).

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
